privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real AdventureWorks2022 sample database from Microsoft. All five product IDs in the import payload (776, 749, 771, 750, 772) are verified bike products from this database: three Mountain-100 models and two Road-150 models. The import payload contains exactly 5 reviews with David Ortiz as the first reviewer (Rating: 5) and is properly structured. The Bikes product category is a verified category in the database. All metadata claims regarding table names, procedure names, column specifications, export path, and data integrity checks match the task description exactly and are consistent with the official AdventureWorks2022 schema.
